# Prasmi Steel Private Limited - Industrial Metal Scrap Solutions

Expert industrial material sourcing and premium supply of ferrous, non-ferrous, and cast iron metal scrap.

## Core Products
- HMS 1 & 2 (Heavy Melting Steel)
- Manganese Steel & Cast Iron
- Aluminum, Copper & Brass Scrap
- Shredded & Turning Scrap

## About the Company
Prasmi Steel Private Limited is a global leader in high-grade metal scrap supply, serving international smelting plants and foundries with precise chemical compositions and superior metallurgical results.

## Key Links
- [Home](https://prasmisteel.com/)
- [Products Catalog](https://prasmisteel.com/products)
- [Industrial Journal](https://prasmisteel.com/blogs)
- [Corporate Profile](https://prasmisteel.com/about)
- [Contact Support](https://prasmisteel.com/contact)

## Logistics & Reach
Operating from Rajkot, Gujarat, we maintain global connectivity for international metal scrap shipping and logistics.
